rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to May 15, 2017. If a hearing is advanced, all parties entitled to notice must be given notice of the advanced hearing date, and in this case, there is no Proof of Service that shows anyone got notice. Also, if a hearing is advanced to a date that does not allow for proper statutory notice, there must be an order shortening time for notice, and the ROA does not indicate an order was issued.
